name: KnxObject
description: Stateful KNX objects (PLAN §5-7). KnxObject : IKnxReceiver holds a GA/DPT/cached value/callback, self-registers in the coordinator's intrusive registry, and decodes incoming telegrams with its own DPT. Intent subclasses (KnxLight, KnxDimmLight, KnxBlind, KnxTemperature, ...) hide the DPT. Header-only so the LDF pulls no Arduino-bound translation unit into native tests; the public Konnextor.h facade lives in its own library above this one.
